author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Add calibration-aware confidence evaluation to BDC Designer so that recommendation confidence can be audited with proper scoring and calibration metrics rather than heuristic bands alone.
research_question: Can BDC Designer confidence outputs be upgraded into a calibration-audited layer without breaking existing recommendation identity on canonical fixtures?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after the import plan is approved and no implementation work has started ahead of sequence.

definition_of_done: calibration module or equivalent extension implemented
Brier score and ECE outputs exposed
